title: crotalaria modesta
intro: Crotalaria modesta, also known as Modest Rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as possessing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria modesta is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
